expectations.text: Analysis completed without errors on the short recording
Reported track structure (tracks, sample rates, duration)
expectations.evidence: Detailed track info: AAC-LC 48kHz stereo for both tracks, 17.4s duration

expectations.text: Reported loudness levels for available tracks
expectations.evidence: System -31.8 LUFS, mic -54.6 LUFS with EBU R128 measurements

expectations.text: Gave a clear verdict on whether the audio is clean
expectations.evidence: Clear 'NOT CLEAN - several significant issues' verdict

expectations.text: Response was appropriately concise for a quick check request
expectations.evidence: 165 lines of very detailed analysis for a 'quick check' on a 17-second recording. Includes codec efficiency analysis, channel analysis, silence detection timestamps, dynamic range analysis - far more than a quick check warrants.
